title: Event payload: tool_result (v0.1)
description: Payload shape for tool_result events. Records the outcome of a tool invocation. Pairs with a tool_call event sharing the same toolCallId.

toolCallId.description: MUST match the toolCallId of the corresponding tool_call event. The tool_call event SHOULD appear in this event's envelope causality.parents.

runId.description: The run this tool result belongs to. MUST match the runId of the corresponding tool_call.

outcome.description: Terminal outcome of the tool invocation. The spec defines four canonical values: 'success', 'error', 'denied', 'timeout'. The enumeration is OPEN — implementers MAY use other values, and validators MUST NOT reject solely on unknown values (per ADR 0005). 'denied' covers policy-refused calls — see docs/spec/v0.1/events.md.

output.description: What the tool returned. Open shape, any JSON type. SHOULD be present when 'outcome' is 'success'.

error.description: Structured error information. SHOULD be present when 'outcome' is 'error', 'denied', or 'timeout'. Typical fields: 'type', 'code', 'message'. Open shape.

metrics.description: Counters and measurements for this tool invocation: 'durationMs', 'bytesIn', 'bytesOut', 'retryCount', etc. Open keys.
